qa_pair.question: What is the identity name of this MikroTik RouterOS device?
How many CPU cores does this MikroTik device have?
How many static DNS records are configured on this router?
What IP address does the static DNS record for 'router.lan' resolve to?
What IP address does the static DNS record for 'api.comagic.ru' resolve to?
What is the name of the address pool used by the DHCP server named 'defconf'?
What is the configured lease time of the DHCP server named 'defconf'?
What is the full CIDR address (IP with prefix length) configured on interface 'ether1'?
What is the gateway IP address for the active default route (destination 0.0.0.0/0) in the 'main' routing table?
How many NAT rules are configured on this router in total?
